summary: End-to-end frontend testing of the GRAFFITI rebrand (formerly ReCell) + Kochi relocation. Verified home rebuild (hero with CountUp stats, dual entry cards, brand grid, 7-step How GRAFFITI Works, bonus formula, Why GRAFFITI, trust indicators, featured marketplace, testimonials, FAQ accordion, store callout), expanded header nav at xl breakpoint with 8 primary items + Sell Now / Buy Now CTAs, mobile hamburger drawer containing all primary nav + Track/Account utility links, and all new routes (/how-it-works, /why-graffiti, /faqs, /track, /contact, /account). Sell flow tested end-to-end (brand → model → variant → 4-step icon-based questionnaire → mobile + OTP 123456 → final ₹ price with Sell Now/Revalue/Restart). Stores page shows all 6 Kochi-only stores (MG Road, Edappally, Kakkanad, Vyttila, Panampilly, Fort Kochi). Buy storefront shows Kochi neighborhoods only (no Mumbai/Bengaluru/etc.). FAQs search filters list (9 -> 1 on 'Kochi'). Track page renders timeline with 'Active now' badge on G-204A. Dashboard Seller/Buyer tab switching works with respective stat cards. 0 console errors across all tested pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx still uses className 'recell-glass-nav' and other 'recell-*' utility classes from index.css. Confirmed by spec as intentional internal class names, so non-blocking. Consider renaming for brand consistency in a future refactor.

Sell.jsx still ~460+ lines with multiple stage components (Brand/Model/Variant/Questionnaire/Otp/Price). Approaching 700-line guideline. Consider splitting stage components into separate files if more logic is added.
No error boundary on any route — if mockData changes break a page (e.g., unknown brand id with no models), the whole app could blank instead of showing a graceful error.
Brand logo text concatenated rendering shows 'GGRAFFITIKochi' when read via textContent (G icon + GRAFFITI + city). Visually correct, just a textContent quirk; non-blocking.
Live price panel responded to answers (Answered counter incremented immediately 0→1, final price changed from ₹78,500 base to ₹73,100 after all 4 steps). Reactive update confirmed.

Step 3 of questionnaire renders 15 question cards (component select-all grid), step 1 = 3 questions with 1 svg icon each — icon-based questionnaire confirmed rendering correctly with no missing icons.
seed_data_creation: None (frontend demo with mockData.js; OTP send/verify and all marketplace/listing/store/FAQ/testimonial data are static)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GRAFFITI demo. Public URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. New testids verified: announcement-strip, logo-link, nav-{home,sell-device,buy-devices,how-it-works,why-graffiti,stores,faqs,contact}, header-cta-buy, header-cta-sell, header-cta-buy-tablet, header-cta-sell-tablet, tablet-menu-toggle, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, dual-entry, entry-sell, entry-buy, hero-stat-{id}, brand-selector-grid, home-search-input, brand-card-{id}, how-graffiti-works, how-step-1..7, bonus-formula, why-graffiti, trust-indicators, featured-buy, featured-view-all, featured-card-{id}, testimonials, testimonial-{id}, home-faqs, home-faqs-all, faq-row-{0..n}, store-callout, store-callout-cta, sell-page, sell-stage-{brand,model,variant,otp,price}, device-condition-form, sell-q-prev/next, sell-mobile-input, sell-send-otp, sell-otp-input, sell-verify-otp, sell-now-cta, sell-revalue-cta, sell-restart, sell-stepbar, sell-back, live-price-panel, price-estimator-card, sell-get-exact-value, question-{id}, answer-{qid}-{label}, faqs-page, faq-search, faqs-list, faq-item-{i}, faq-cta-contact, track-page, track-input, track-cta, track-result, contact-page, contact-form, contact-topic-{name}, contact-message, contact-submit, stores-page, store-{id}, dashboard-tabs, tab-seller, tab-buyer, seller-stats, seller-can-do, buyer-stats, buyer-can-do, listing-{id}, buyer-order-{id}, site-footer. Brand text 'GRAFFITI' and 'Kochi' verified across header, footer, announcement strip, sell flow text, stores, buy storefront, dashboard. Zero console errors recorded.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures. Every spec'd flow returned the expected DOM/text. Sell-flow OTP 123456 verified and routed to final-price stage. Mobile breakpoint < xl correctly hides desktop nav and shows hamburger; drawer contains Home/Sell Device/Buy Devices/How It Works/Why GRAFFITI/Stores/FAQs/Contact + Track My Device + My Account + Buy Now + Sell Now.
